InstructionData.Title: ScriptTemplate
InstructionData.Author: LowrentTrent
InstructionData.Instructions:
INIT: alias d_xxx d0 #device 0 alias d_xxx d1 #device 1 alias d_xxx d2 #device 2 alias d_xxx d3 #device 3 alias d_xxx d4 #device 4 alias d_xxx d5 #device 5
alias r_0 r0 #not used alias r_xxx r1 #register description alias r_xxx r2 alias r_xxx r3 alias r_xxx r4 alias r_xxx r5
START:
